issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1238: remaining Python asset sweep 8/10

commands: for dir in src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then find "$dir" -name '*.py' -type f; fi; done

notes: This lane documents the remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
